landing.headline: How AI-Ready Are You?
landing.subhead: Find out in 5 minutes. Get your personalized readiness score — and optionally compare yourself with your team.
landing.feature1Desc: Rate your AI capabilities across 50+ tools and practices — quick and hands-on.
landing.feature2Desc: See where you stand on the AI development timeline — and how fast the gap is closing.
landing.feature3Desc: Optional: Invite your team and compare scores, spot strengths, and identify growth areas together.

profile.title: About You
profile.name: Your name
profile.nameHint: Optional if your team uses anonymous mode

selfAssessment.scoreLabel: How would you rate your AI tool usage compared to what's possible?
selfAssessment.utilizationLabel: What percentage of your daily work is AI-assisted?
selfAssessment.utilizationAfterLabel: What percentage of your daily work is AI-assisted?
selfAssessment.potentialLabel: What percentage of your work COULD be AI-assisted?
selfAssessment.confidenceLabel: How confident are you that you know most AI tools relevant to your work?

currentUsage.title: Current AI Usage
currentUsage.tools: Which AI tools do you use?
currentUsage.modes: How do you interact with AI?
currentUsage.contexts: In which contexts do you use AI?
currentUsage.frequency: How often do you use AI tools?
currentUsage.config: Which advanced configurations do you use?

mindset.title: Mindset & Barriers
mindset.openness: How open are you to AI tools in your workflow?
mindset.barriers: What blocks you from using AI more?
mindset.priorityAreas: Top 3 areas where you'd most want AI help

knowledgeManagement.title: Knowledge Management
knowledgeManagement.subtitle: How do you stay on top of AI developments?
knowledgeManagement.awareness: How well do you stay informed about current AI developments?
knowledgeManagement.filtering: How well do you distinguish relevant AI news from hype?
knowledgeManagement.contextualization: Can you apply new AI developments to your own work and context?
knowledgeManagement.overload: How much do you feel overwhelmed by the volume of AI news?
knowledgeManagement.knowledgeTransfer: How well does AI knowledge sharing work within your organization?

features.title: Capability Assessment
features.subtitle: For each capability, select your usage level and indicate whether it's relevant to your work.
features.minRequired: Please answer at least {min} to continue
features.relevanceTooltip: Is this capability relevant to your daily work? If not, it won't be counted in your score calculation.
features.tierTooltip1: Foundational AI knowledge relevant to every professional today.
features.tierTooltip2: AI tools that are actively used and measurably improve daily work.
features.tierTooltip3: AI is fully integrated into daily workflows and used professionally every day.
features.tierTooltip4: AI automates recurring processes and orchestrates complex workflows.
features.tierTooltip5: Advanced AI integration: autonomous agents, cross-system connectivity, and organizational embedding.

postAssessment.title: Final Thoughts
postAssessment.topCategories: Which categories would have the biggest impact on your work?
postAssessment.topCategoriesHint: Please select at least one category.
postAssessment.freeText: Anything else you'd like to share?
postAssessment.freeTextPlaceholder: Optional: your thoughts on AI in your workflow...

results.title: Your AI Readiness Score
results.gapWidening: You're currently using {pct}% of available AI capabilities — without change, that stays the same
results.gapClosing: You're catching up — currently using {pct}% of available AI capabilities
results.gapStable: You're keeping pace — currently using {pct}% of available AI capabilities
results.improvementPotential: With targeted upskilling, you could use {pct}% more of available AI capabilities in 12 months
results.kmRadarDesc: How you navigate the AI information landscape across 5 dimensions
results.usageMatrixDesc: Capabilities you find relevant — mapped against how much you actually use them
results.matrixPriorityGapsDesc: Relevant to you, but not yet mastered
results.matrixHiddenStrengthsDesc: Well-used, but not flagged as priority
results.selfPerceptionDesc: How did your initial estimate compare to your actual measured results?
results.opportunitiesDesc: Based on your answers, your biggest opportunities are in:
